---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is.
Example: I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Use Case

Describe the use case and why this feature would be valuable. Explain how it would help your Chrome extension development.

## API Suggestion

If applicable, describe the API you'd like to see:

```typescript
// Example API suggestion
const msg = createMessenger<Messages>();

// New functionality would work like this:
msg.send("ping", { /* ... */ });
```

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered alternative approaches? If so, why would your proposed solution be better?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or mockups about the feature request here.
